title: Infrastructure as Code for Beginners (AWS CDK)
summary: A YouTube tutorial from AWS Developers showing how to build a serverless REST API on AWS using the Cloud Development Kit (CDK) with Python. The video contrasts manual AWS console configuration (ClickOps) with Infrastructure as Code approach, covering DynamoDB, Lambda, and API Gateway deployment through CDK.
